channel.title: What Is Being Built — Daily Activity Feed
channel.description: Daily updates on open-source automated research tools: commits, releases, and community activity.

item.title: Daily digest — 2026-06-28
item.description:
Our community has seen exciting progress across multiple projects recently. The `giladfeldman/escicheck` project has been updated to align with EffectCheck version 0.6.6, resolving issue #20 and bringing the `main` branch up to date. Meanwhile, `shaheedazaad/auto-zcurve` has improved its validation note with a newly added citation, enhancing the project's credibility and transparency. Additionally, `giovannacdelsordo/output-it-forward` has expanded its reach by adding a Chrome Webstore link, making it easier for users to access the tool. These updates demonstrate the connections and collaborations within our community, as projects continue to build upon and support each other's work. Overall, it's been a productive period, with notable advancements and a clear commitment to quality and accessibility.

30 commits across 4 active repositories this week.

Dormant repos revived: escicheck, auto-zcurve

Most active:

metacheck10 commits
docpluck10 commits
regcheck7 commits
escicheck3 commits

item.title: escicheck: activity update
item.description:
giladfeldman/escicheck

The `main` branch was updated with a commit that synced changes from `escicheckapp@f37b5a1`, which corresponds to EffectCheck version 0.6.6. This commit, as described, brought the `main` branch in line with the specified version of EffectCheck. The commit message explicitly mentions that this is related to issue #20, indicating that this sync is likely a resolution or part of the work for that issue. No other branches were mentioned in the provided commits, so all changes were confined to the `main` branch. The specific changes or features added by this sync are not detailed in the commit message, only the source and version of the changes. The commit effectively updated the `main` branch to reflect the state of `escicheckapp` at version 0.6.6.

⚠ This repository was dormant and has recently become active again.

View all commits →

item.title: auto-zcurve: activity update
item.description:
shaheedazaad/auto-zcurve

The `main` branch was worked on, where the validation note was revised and a citation was included, as stated in the commit message "Revise validation note and include citation". No other branches were modified in this set of commits. The change specifically involved revising a validation note, with the addition of a citation to support or reference the validation. This revision and addition were the only changes made in this set of commits. The commit message does not mention any other modifications or additions to the repository beyond this specific revision and citation inclusion. The work was done by Shaheed Azaad on June 14, 2026.

⚠ This repository was dormant and has recently become active again.

View all commits →
